user.title: Setup MoeBot
user.description: Choose your preferred connection method to configure your MoeBot.

cloud.title: Tuya Cloud Authentication
cloud.description: Enter your Tuya Developer account credentials to look up the device, including the local encryption key.

device_select.title: Select a Device
device_select.description: The following devices were found. Select one to configure it.

device_details.title: Manual Device Specifications
device_details.description: Enter the details for your MoeBot.

progress.cloud_fetch: Fetching devices attached to your Tuya Cloud account...
progress.local_scan: Scanning local network for matching MoeBot hardware...

error.invalid_ip: The provided IP address formatting is invalid.
error.cannot_connect: Could not establish a connection to the MoeBot hardware. Check network alignment.
error.unknown: An unhandled software or connection loop error occurred.
error.not_a_moebot: The device does not appear to be a MoeBot. Please check your device ID and try again.
error.no_devices_found: No new unconfigured MoeBot devices were found on your network.

abort.already_configured: This specific MoeBot is already connected to your Home Assistant environment.
abort.no_devices_found: No new unconfigured MoeBot devices were found on your network.
